note: Pakistan labor law overtime rates. Rules vary by sector/province. Consult HR or a labor lawyer for specific cases.

bases.label: Factories Act 1934 (Manufacturing)
bases.note: 2× hourly rate for overtime. Standard: 8 hrs/day, 48 hrs/week.

bases.label: Mines Act 1923
bases.note: 2× for overtime. Underground mines have stricter limits.

bases.label: Generic / Other (user-defined)
bases.note: Default: 1.5× overtime. Adjust multiplier as per your employment contract.
